---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
image: profile.PNG
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope-at-fill
      text: "me@{this domain}"
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vlohmanova/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/fulcrum101
---

in short, this is how my journey has been so far

# Education {.text-left}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### The University of Manchester 🇬🇧

-   BSc (Hons) Computer Science and Mathematics - 2024 - 2027
-   Main focus: Probability, Statistics, ML and AI
-   Year 1 results: Overall grade $91.4\%$, top $1\%$ on the course, top $0.3\%$ among Year 1 students in the Department of Computer Science
-   Relevant courses: Probability and Statistics II, Machine Learning, Linear Regression Models

### Riga State Gymnasium No. 1 🇱🇻

-   General Secondary Education Diploma - 2021 - 2024
-   Including Mathematics HL, Programming HL, English HL with average grade: $9.5/10$ across $19$ subjects
-   State examinations: Mathematics HL ($99\%/100\%$), Programming HL ($91\%/100\%$)
-   Extra examinations: IELTS ($7.5/9$), SAT ($1490/1600$), IB CS HL ($7/7$)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Experience

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Research Assistant 🇬🇧

-   The University of Manchester - 06/2025 - 08/2025 (voluntary)
-   Produced an introductory write-up on foundational concepts at the intersection of Conformal Prediction and Imprecise Probability under the supervision of [Michele Caprio](https://michelecaprio.wixsite.com/caprio)

### Computer Science Teacher 🇱🇻

-   [Programming School No. 1](https://pps.lv/) - 09/2023 - 05/2024
-   Introduced computer science concepts e.g. iteration, selection, working with files and API via Scratch and MIT App Inventor for $1^\text{st}$-$6^\text{th}$ grade students <!--
            ### Project Manager and Front-end Developer🇱🇻

            - [programme.lv](https://programme.lv/tasks) - 12/2022 - 04/2024 (voluntary)
            - Contributed in programming the front end of a dynamic website with NextJS using MantineUI and TailwindCSS
            - Created marketing campaign with video advertisement that won 3rd place at competition [Business Sketches 2023](https://konkurss.biznesaskices.lv/) hosted by Swedbank
            - Communicated with prospective sponsors and planned workflow among team members
            --->

### Technical Coordinator 🇱🇻

-   [Latvian Student Integration Bee](https://analizesturnirs.lv) - 10/2023 - 12/2023
-   Coded and hosted static webpage with HTML and W3CSS with incorporated version control
-   Introduced and maintained custom domain emails for the organising committee

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Volunteering and Leadership

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### President 🇬🇧

-   [Hackchester](https://www.linkedin.com/company/hackchester) (the University of Manchester Cyber Security Society) - 10/2024 - 05/2025
-   Led committee of $5$ members
-   Successfully planned and hosted weekly events over whole academic year

```{=html}
<!---
### Volunteer 🇱🇻

-   [Latvian Kendo Federation](https://www.facebook.com/LatvijasKendoFederacija) - 04/2022 - 08/2024
-   Created visuals, flyers and banners for marketing campaigns in Figma and website using Streamlit
-   Contributed in introducing and maintaining the digitisation system of the scoring system for 2 of the biggest international kendo competitions held in Latvia via Google Sheets
-   Promoted kendo, Japanese martial arts and culture, and healthy lifestyle at 5 festivals with an average of 15,000 visitors each
---->
```

### Lead Organiser 🇱🇻

-   [ProblemCon++](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100082875841673) - 09/2021 - 11/20222
-   Hosted $2$ programming contests and a hackathon to bring students' interest to the IT sphere
-   Obtained sponsorship from $9$ companies, including major local companies and a leading IT education fund <!---
            ***
            ## Certificates
            ***
            ### Machine Learning with Python from freeCodeCamp

            - Represents approximately 300 hours of work with TensorFlow and Python

            ### Tensorflow Developer Certificate from Google 
            - Certificate’s exam tests skills in building TensorFlow models in CV, CNN and NLP (was active 04/2022 - 04/2025)
            --->

::: {.callout-note icon="false"}
# Academic Awards

------------------------------------------------------------------------

-   **Michael Jealous Memorial Prize** (for excellence in Year 1 studies) and **Golden Anniversary Prize** (for best Year 1 student in CS Department)
-   **Letter of Recognition** from the Prime Minister of the Republic of Latvia for achieved excellence in academic studies in school
:::
